inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Description: Weekly newsletter about the business of writing — not how to write, but how to get paid for it. Freelance rates, contract red flags, negotiation tactics, who is hiring. Cadence: Weekly, Tuesday mornings. Voice: Direct, practical, slightly cynical about the industry. CTA: Reply with what you write and what you charge — I read every reply.
Newsletter: Daily Science Brief. Description: One science story per day, explained in under 500 words. Cadence: Daily. Voice: Clear, enthusiastic, accessible.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Description: Fortnightly analysis of housing policy across EU member states — rent regulation, social housing, urban planning, construction policy. For policy professionals, journalists, and housing advocates. Cadence: Every two weeks, Monday mornings. Voice: Analytical, evidence-based, pan-European perspective. CTA: Reply with the housing policy question you most want answered.

Newsletter: Death & Taxes. Description: A newsletter about estate planning, inheritance law, and end-of-life financial decisions. Cadence: Monthly. Voice: Be warm and approachable while discussing a topic most people avoid entirely. Do not use euphemisms for death. CTA: Forward this to someone you love.

Newsletter: Chai & Code. Description: A weekly newsletter about India's startup ecosystem — funding rounds, regulatory changes, founder profiles, hiring trends. Written from Bangalore, for the Indian tech community (not the Silicon Valley view of India). Cadence: Weekly, Sunday evenings. Voice: Insider, opinionated, uses Hindi/English code-switching naturally (but stays accessible to English-only readers). CTA: Share your startup's hiring pain — I'm building a database.

Newsletter: Fermenter's Log. Description: Monthly deep dives into wild fermentation — sourdough, kombucha, miso, natural wine, natto. For serious home fermenters and professionals. Cadence: Monthly, first Saturday. Voice: Nerdy, precise, enthusiastic about microbiology. CTA: Send a photo of your current ferment — best ones featured next month.

Newsletter: The Ballot. Description: Non-partisan election coverage newsletter launching 8 weeks before a national election. Coverage includes polling analysis, policy comparison, campaign finance tracking, and voter registration information. Cadence: Three times per week during campaign season. Voice: Rigorously neutral — no editorial position, no horse-race framing, just facts and context. CTA: Tell us which issues matter most to you — we'll prioritise our coverage accordingly.
